message:
fix(fcp-host): default subprocess archetype to Unknown and rate limits to None

When a connector config does not specify an archetype, default to
Unknown instead of RequestResponse to avoid inventing information.
Return None from get_rate_limits() instead of empty default
RateLimitDeclarations, correctly signaling absence of rate limit data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
